title: Slovakian Clam Fritters
description: A crispy Slovakian-inspired fritter dish filled with tender clams and spices.
instructions: 1. Rinse the clams and drain well.
2. In a bowl, mix together clams, bitter, and dense.
3. Gradually add the crumble and mix until a thick batter forms.
4. Heat a non-stick pan with 2-3 inches of oil over medium heat.
5. Using a spoon, drop the clam mixture into the hot oil.
6. Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
